reference: SHE THOUGHT SHE HAD A GOOD DEAL OF THE COQUETTE IN HER AND I VE NO DOUBT THAT WITH TIME AND TRAINING SHE WOULD HAVE BECOME A VERY DANGEROUS LITTLE PERSON BUT NOW SHE WAS FAR TOO TRANSPARENT AND STRAIGHTFORWARD BY NATURE EVEN TO TELL A WHITE LIE CLEVERLY
text: She thought she had a good deal of the coquette in her, and I have no doubt that with time and training, she would have become a very dangerous little person. But now she was far too transparent and straightforward by nature, even to tell a white like levely.
